records.m_Talk_ENG:
혯
8gme?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
혯
8gme?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
혯
8gme?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She talked?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She talked?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She talked?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you forget about... me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you forget about... me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you forget about... me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha! Get back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha! Get back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha! Get back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! So she was a Shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! So she was a Shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! So she was a Shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been waiting all this time for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been waiting all this time for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been waiting all this time for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why can't you remember who I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why can't you remember who I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why can't you remember who I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you that I'll keep on waiting...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you that I'll keep on waiting...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you that I'll keep on waiting...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>BUT YOU NEVER CAME BACK FOR ME!!!!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>BUT YOU NEVER CAME BACK FOR ME!!!!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>BUT YOU NEVER CAME BACK FOR ME!!!!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... Asha! Get somewhere safe!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... Asha! Get somewhere safe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... Asha! Get somewhere safe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!
